transition: 大過 Dà Guò (Great Exceeding) -> 剝 Bō (Splitting Apart)
verse_zh: 廓落失業，跨禍度福，利無所得。
verse_en: Vast and vacant, livelihood lost; straddling disaster, crossing toward fortune. Profit is nowhere to be found.
note: Loss and emptiness -> ominous tone -> atmospheric-night. The empty basket carries 'profit nowhere to be found'.
prompt: Inside a ruined gateway framing a vast empty courtyard, a single lantern gutters against the dark like a dying ember. Foreground: cracked flagstones and an overturned empty basket. Midground: a lone figure crosses a narrow plank between two pools of shadow. Far off, faint cold hills dissolve into black mist. One vermillion seal glows on a leaning post. Chinese ink painting.
